overview.description: Vietnam's insurance market is underinsured relative to GDP with penetration ~2.5%. Growth is accelerating with digital-first insurtech players. AI use cases include fraud detection, claims automation, risk scoring, and customer churn prediction.
overview.marketSizeVietnam: ~$8B insurance market; 18 life and 30 non-life insurers; insurtech growing fast
overview.marketSizeSEA: ~$80B insurance market; Singapore and Indonesia lead AI adoption in claims

domainKnowledge.typicalDataVolume: Medium — structured policy and claims data; medical records fragmented
domainKnowledge.dataQuality: Medium — core systems structured; fraud and medical data harder to standardize

painPoints.problem: Insurance fraud (staged accidents, fake claims) is growing rapidly
Claims processing is manual and slow, causing customer dissatisfaction
Risk scoring models are outdated and fail to leverage alternative data

relatedNodes.description: Insurance and finance share risk modeling, fraud detection, and regulatory compliance.
Insurance contracts require legal analysis and compliance monitoring.
